system.game_start: The game begins — Good luck everyone.
system.peaceful_night: The night was peaceful. Nobody died.
system.mayor_reveal: {{name}} revealed themselves as Mayor! Their votes count triple.
system.player_eliminated: {{name}} was eliminated by the village. Their role was: {{role}}.
system.player_eliminated_will: {{name}} was eliminated by the village. Their role was: {{role}}. | Last Will: "{{will}}"

notifications.jailed: You were jailed by the Jailor!
notifications.roleblocked: Someone prevented you from acting tonight.
notifications.bodyguard_saved: A bodyguard sacrificed themselves to protect you!
notifications.bodyguard_sacrifice: You sacrificed yourself to protect your target.
notifications.protection_saved: You were attacked but your protection saved you!
notifications.night_immune: Someone tried to kill you, but you survived!
notifications.vigilante_guilt: You killed an innocent... Guilt consumes you.
notifications.spy_no_visit: The mafia didn't visit anyone tonight.
notifications.executioner_to_jester: Your target died... You are now a Jester. Get yourself lynched!
notifications.jail_protected: You were in jail, you were protected.

mafia: was found riddled with bullets at dawn.
was found lifeless in a dark alley... a clean execution.
was found dead at home. A professional job.
was found gunned down in front of their door.
didn't survive the night... the Mafia shows no mercy.
sk: was found in a pool of blood... the work of a psychopath.
was found lacerated behind the tavern.
was found mutilated... an act of pure madness.
vigilante: was found shot dead... vigilante justice?
was found with a bullet in the heart... a vigilante struck.
jailor: was found dead in their cell at dawn.
death_messages.unknown: was found dead under mysterious circumstances.
death_messages.vigilante_suicide: {{name}} committed suicide from guilt. Their role was: Vigilante.
death_messages.protection_success: {{name}} was attacked, but was saved by the doctor.

gameover.xp_hint: Log in to save your XP
gameover.accused_defense: {{name}} is accused! Time to defend yourself.

action_tooltips.MAFIA_KILL: The mafia eliminates a player tonight
action_tooltips.HEAL: Heal a player to protect them tonight
action_tooltips.PROTECT: Protect a player from an attack
action_tooltips.BODYGUARD: Protect a player at the risk of your life
action_tooltips.INVESTIGATE: Find out if this player is suspicious or not
action_tooltips.INVESTIGATE_ROLE: Discover the exact role of a player
action_tooltips.LOOKOUT: Watch who visits this player tonight
action_tooltips.JAIL: Jail a player for the night (blocks their actions)
action_tooltips.FRAME: Make a player appear suspicious to investigators
action_tooltips.BLACKMAIL: Prevent a player from speaking the next day
action_tooltips.REVEAL: Reveal your Mayor role (3 votes, but no more healing)

chat.dead_no_will: Dead players can't write a will.
chat.skip_only_day: Skip only available during discussion or voting.

vigilante_night1: Cannot shoot on the first night
judgment_default_guilty: Guilty by default — vote Innocent to save

scene.no_lynch: Everyone can go home safely tonight.

last_will_placeholder_write: Write your last will... It will be revealed upon your death.
ambiance: A black cat slowly crosses the village square...
Furtive footsteps echo in the alley...
A shadow slips between the houses...
The torches flicker in the darkness...
A light goes out in a distant house...
The gallows creak in the wind...
The moon disappears behind the clouds for a moment...
A shutter slams somewhere in the village...
The fog thickens around the village...
A crow caws in the distance...
The air is thick with tension tonight...
